name: SOLITRON DEVICES INC
business: Solitron Devices, Inc. designs, develops, manufactures and markets solid state semiconductor components and related devices primarily for the military and aerospace markets. Most of its products are custom made pursuant to contracts with customers whose end products are sold to the United States government. Other products, such as JAN transistors, diodes and SMD voltage regulators, are sold as standard or catalog items.
sellsTo: United States government and its prime contractors

exposures.sentence: Solitron Devices, Inc. ... designs, develops, manufactures and markets solid state semiconductor components and related devices primarily for the military and aerospace markets.
Most of the Company's products are custom made pursuant to contracts with customers whose end products are sold to the United States government.
The Company's products have been used on the space shuttle and on the space missions to the moon, to Jupiter (on Galileo), and to Mars (on Global Surveyor and Mars Sojourner).
During the fiscal year ended February 28, 2026, ConMed Linvatec accounted for approximately 33% of net sales

Custom products are typically sold to the United States government and defense or aerospace companies, such as RTX Corporation (formerly Raytheon Technologies Corporation), Lockheed Martin, L3Harris Technologies, General Electric Aviation, Honeywell International, and Northrop Grumman Systems Corporation
